highlights: Developed and maintained scalable backend services using Python, FastAPI, and Flask, supporting high-performance production applications in an Agile environment.
Designed and managed SQLAlchemy ORM models with SQL Server and PostgreSQL, ensuring efficient and secure data handling.
Implemented secure authentication and authorization using JWT and API-Key based access control.
Resolved 500+ JIRA issues, including critical bugs, feature enhancements, and performance optimizations, improving system reliability.
Successfully delivered two major API projects for the CStoreiQ back-office platform and live data integrations.
Integrated Elasticsearch for advanced search, logging, and monitoring, improving system observability and debugging efficiency.
Implemented asynchronous workflows using RabbitMQ, improving system scalability and data processing reliability.
Developed and optimized complex SQL stored procedures, resulting in improved API response times and database performance.
Deployed and managed backend services on AWS, ensuring scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure.
Implemented Database Connection Pooling to optimize database performance and resource utilization in high-traffic production environments.
Developed Async Logging Systems for non-blocking application logging, improving application performance and debugging capabilities.
Configured and managed .env Configuration Management for secure handling of environment variables and application settings across different deployment stages.

skills.title: Security & Cloud
items: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, EventBridge, RDS, SQS, SNS, IAM)

projects.title: India Emergency Resource Directory
description: Built a full-stack emergency registry for verified India helplines, rescue centers, medical grids, and disaster support networks.
Implemented state/district hierarchical filtering and fuzzy search for instant access to local crisis services.
Enabled citizen suggestion submissions with evidence-based auditing and admin review workflows.
Secured administrative access through .env-driven authentication and restricted control desk capabilities.
Designed audit verification tags and report flows for dead numbers, misinformation, and invalid entries.
Delivered a responsive React + Tailwind UI backed by a robust Express API and reliable persistent data store.
projects.technologies: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Express, Supabase, Vite, Node.js, Lucide Icons, JSON persistence, .env.

projects.title: Smart Scale Tech Job Bot
description: Built an automated job scraping bot that monitors LinkedIn, Naukri, Remotive, WeWorkRemotely, and RemoteOK.
Filtered roles by category, keyword, and target locations like Hyderabad, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, and Remote.
Exposed a Flask trigger API for background scrapes, ideal for Render deployment with external scheduler services.
Persisted state safely with sent_jobs.json and last_run.json to prevent duplicate Telegram notifications.
Implemented log rotation and production-safe console output for clean operational monitoring.
Ensured Telegram compatibility with safe Markdown escaping in notifications.
projects.technologies: Python, Flask, Web Scraping, Telegram Bot API, GitHub state sync, log rotation, JSON persistence.

projects.title: Automated Data Processing and Real-Time Sync Tool
description: Developed a Python automation that reduced manual data processing by 98% through automated workflows.
Implemented scheduled Cron jobs to fetch, clean, and process data from multiple sources automatically.
Created real-time data synchronization between different systems using API integrations and database triggers.
Built comprehensive logging and error handling with automatic alerting for failed processes.
Designed data validation checks and quality assurance modules to ensure accuracy in automated processing.
Developed a monitoring dashboard to track automation status, success rates, and performance metrics.
projects.technologies: Python, Cron Jobs, Pandas, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Logging, API Integration.

projects.title: SQL Server to PostgreSQL Data Migration
description: Designed and developed a high-performance data migration system to transfer data from SQL Server to PostgreSQL using Python.
Implemented an asynchronous pipeline to extract data from SQL Server, store it locally as structured JSON, and insert it into PostgreSQL with high accuracy.
Utilized async processing and asynchronous logging to significantly improve migration speed and reliability.
Configured environment-based settings using .env files to ensure secure and flexible deployments.
Reduced manual intervention by enabling table-driven migrations through API inputs.
projects.technologies: Python, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Pandas, NumPy, AsyncIO, Logging, .env

projects.title: Weather Dashboard API with External Integration
description: Developed a Django REST API integrating with multiple weather APIs (OpenWeatherMap, WeatherAPI) to provide unified weather data.
Implemented Redis caching and rate limiting to optimize performance and reduce external API costs by 40%.
Built user preference system for saving locations and customizing temperature units (Celsius/Fahrenheit).
Created historical weather endpoints with date filtering and data aggregation for trend analysis.
Added webhook notifications for severe weather alerts and automated daily forecast emails using Celery.
projects.technologies: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, Redis, Celery, OpenWeatherMap API, PostgreSQL, Docker.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Built a responsive professional portfolio with a mobile-first approach using HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery.
Implemented a Real-Time Communication Suite featuring automated email delivery and WhatsApp API integration for instant client messaging.
Designed interactive UI components with smooth animations and dynamic content loading for enhanced user engagement.
Utilized CSS Grid/Flexbox and semantic markup to ensure cross-browser compatibility and accessible design.
projects.technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery, WhatsApp Business API, SMTP Integration.

projects.title: Detection of Covid-19 from Chest X-ray using Web Application
description: Developed a web application to detect whether a chest X-ray image belongs to a COVID-19 patient with high accuracy (97.5%+).
Used ResNet-50 model for image analysis and Streamlit for real-time frontend interaction.
Processed each image in 3-5 seconds for fast, reliable results.

projects.title: Real-Time RESTful API Backend for E-commerce
description: Developed a scalable RESTful API for e-commerce platform using FastAPI to handle products, orders, and user requests in real time.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control.
Optimized SQLAlchemy queries with PostgreSQL to ensure fast and reliable database operations.
